name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text: ℹ️ How to use CryptoWatch Everything is controlled by tapping buttons — no commands to remember. • ➕ Add Coin — Track a cryptocurrency • 📊 Price — Check current prices • 🔔 Manage Alerts — Set price or percent alerts • ⚙️ Settings — Timezone, quiet hours, daily summary Tap /start to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
